name: Green Beans Deluxe
recipeIngredient: 10 1/2 oz Can cream of mushroom soup
8 oz Can French fried onion rings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep, 1 1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole dish, combine the canned cut green beans and the cream of mushroom soup. Blend well.
2. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 5 to 7 minutes.
3. Sprinkle the top of the bean mixture with French fried onion rings. Cover and heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven an additional 3 minutes or until the onions are heated through.
